message:
feat(svg,term): support new arrow types and inline edge styles

SVG renderer:
- Add a11y descriptions for 5 new ArrowType variants: ThickLine, DottedLine,
  DoubleArrow, DoubleThickArrow, DoubleDottedArrow
- Add ArrowheadMarker::with_orient() builder method for marker orientation
- Apply inline styles from linkStyle directives to edge elements via
  resolve_edge_inline_style()

Terminal renderer:
- Draw arrowheads at start point for double arrow types (DoubleArrow,
  DoubleThickArrow, DoubleDottedArrow) using reverse-direction calculation
- Suppress end arrowheads for line-only types (Line, ThickLine, DottedLine)
- Use dotted line characters for DottedLine and DoubleDottedArrow types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -117,6 +117,11 @@ pub fn describe_edge(
         fm_core::ArrowType::DottedArrow => "optionally points to",
         fm_core::ArrowType::Circle => "relates to",
         fm_core::ArrowType::Cross => "blocks",
+        fm_core::ArrowType::ThickLine => "strongly connects to",
+        fm_core::ArrowType::DottedLine => "optionally connects to",
+        fm_core::ArrowType::DoubleArrow => "points both ways to",
+        fm_core::ArrowType::DoubleThickArrow => "strongly points both ways to",
+        fm_core::ArrowType::DoubleDottedArrow => "optionally points both ways to",
     };
 
     if let Some(label_text) = label {
